Careers
Work at NLR and join the engaged, passionate, and talented people who are working
    to develop an affordable and secure energy future.
Find a Job
Search our current job openings and apply online.
Internships
Learn about internships for full-time undergraduate and graduate students.
Postdoctoral Opportunities
Receive advanced training by joining our Research Participant Program for postdoc researchers.
Workforce Development
Find additional pathways to work within NLR and learn about careers in energy.
